---
title: The Humans
author: Matt Haig
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★ | A Novel
rating: 3
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# The Humans

## Reading Journey
- 2025-12-27: Started
- 2025-12-27: 1
    - 1 mins
- Total Time Taken: 1 minutes
## Bookmarks
